### check_if_generated

>  check_if_generated (project:Optional[str]=None, file_path:str='')

*Check if a file is auto-generated by nbdev.*

USE THIS BEFORE EDITING ANY PYTHON FILE IN A NBDEV PROJECT!

<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>Path to the file to check.</td>
</tr>

<td></td>

### find_source_notebook

>  find_source_notebook (project:Optional[str]=None, py_file:str='')

*Find which notebook generated a given Python file.*

CRITICAL: Use this to find the source before editing any .py file!

### edit_notebook_cell

>  edit_notebook_cell (project:Optional[str]=None, notebook:str='',
>                          cell_index:int=0, new_source:str='')

*Edit a specific cell in a notebook.*

Run nbdev_export afterward to regenerate Python modules!

### add_notebook_cell

>  add_notebook_cell (project:Optional[str]=None, notebook:str='',
>                         source:str='', cell_type:str='code',
>                         position:str='auto', after_index:Optional[int]=None,
>                         export:bool=False, section_header:Optional[str]=None)

*Add a new cell to a notebook with smart positioning.*

Positions: - ‘auto’: Insert before the standard ending (## Next, \##
Export) - ‘import’: Add to the imports section - ‘start’: Insert at
beginning - ‘end’: Append to end - ‘after’: Insert after specific index

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>notebook</td>
<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>Notebook filename.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>source</td>
<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>Source code for the new cell.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>cell_type</td>
<td>str</td>
<td>code</td>
<td>Cell type (‘code’ or ‘markdown’).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>position</td>
<td>str</td>
<td>auto</td>
<td>Where to insert: ‘auto’, ‘import’, ‘start’, ‘end’, or ‘after’.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>after_index</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Cell index to insert after (required if position=‘after’).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>export</td>
<td>bool</td>
<td>False</td>
<td>If True and cell_type=‘code’, prepend <code>#\| export</code>
directive.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>section_header</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>If provided, add a markdown section header before the code
cell.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Result with inserted cell index.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/tools/editing.py#L558"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### split_markdown_cells

>  split_markdown_cells (markdown:str)

*Split a markdown blob into notebook-friendly markdown cells.*

Rules: - Each heading line (`#`, `##`, …) is its own cell - Text after a
heading becomes a separate cell - Reference link definitions are
propagated to cells that use them

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 9%" />
<col style="width: 38%" />
<col style="width: 52%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>markdown</td>
<td>str</td>
<td>Full markdown document text.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td><strong>Result with ‘cells’ list ready for notebook
insertion.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

## Notebook Diff

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/tools/editing.py#L588"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### notebook_diff

>  notebook_diff (project:Optional[str]=None, notebook:str='',
>                     other:Optional[str]=None, cell_index:Optional[int]=None,
>                     context_lines:int=3)

*Show diff between notebook versions or cells.*

Can compare: - Two different notebooks (notebook vs other) - A specific
cell against git HEAD - Entire notebook against git HEAD (if other not
provided)

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Project path or alias. Uses current project if not specified.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>notebook</td>
<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>Primary notebook filename relative to nbs/.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>other</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Second notebook to compare against. If not provided, compares
against git HEAD.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>cell_index</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Specific cell to diff. If not provided, diffs entire notebook.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>context_lines</td>
<td>int</td>
<td>3</td>
<td>Number of context lines around changes (default: 3).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Result with ‘diff’ text and ‘changes’ summary.</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>

------------------------------------------------------------------------

<a
href="https://github.com/s01st/nbdev-mcp/blob/main/nbdev_mcp/tools/editing.py#L736"
target="_blank" style="float:right; font-size:smaller">source</a>

### execute_cell

>  execute_cell (project:Optional[str]=None, notebook:str='',
>                    cell_index:int=0, timeout:int=60)

*Execute a specific cell from a notebook and return its output.*

Uses execnb to execute the cell in isolation. Code cells are executed
and their outputs captured. Markdown cells are returned as-is.

<table>
<colgroup>
<col style="width: 6%" />
<col style="width: 25%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
<col style="width: 34%" />
</colgroup>
<thead>
<tr>
<th></th>
<th><strong>Type</strong></th>
<th><strong>Default</strong></th>
<th><strong>Details</strong></th>
</tr>
</thead>
<tbody>
<tr>
<td>project</td>
<td>Optional</td>
<td>None</td>
<td>Path or alias for nbdev project.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>notebook</td>
<td>str</td>
<td></td>
<td>Path to the notebook (relative to nbs/).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>cell_index</td>
<td>int</td>
<td>0</td>
<td>The 0-based index of the cell to execute.</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td>timeout</td>
<td>int</td>
<td>60</td>
<td>Execution timeout in seconds (default 60).</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<td><strong>Returns</strong></td>
<td><strong>Dict</strong></td>
<td></td>
<td><strong>Result dict with:<br>- ok: bool<br>- cell_type: ‘code’ or
‘markdown’<br>- source: cell source code<br>- outputs: list of output
dicts (for code cells)<br>- stdout: captured stdout<br>- stderr:
captured stderr<br>- execution_count: int<br>- error: str if execution
failed</strong></td>
</tr>
</tbody>
</table>
